results.rendered_html:
prabhūta p. p.
1 Sprung from, produced.
2 Much, abundant.
3 Numerous, many.
4 Mature, perfect.
5 High, lofty.
6 Long.
7 Presided over.
8 Abounding in.
9 Gone up or upwards.
Comp.
— yavaseṃdhana a. abounding in fresh grass and fuel.
— vayas a. advanced in age, old, aged.
